scripts.kit-validate: sbx kit validate ./claude && sbx kit validate ./pi
scripts.run-claude: TAG=dev-$(date +%s) && docker buildx bake claude --load --no-cache --set "claude.tags=ghcr.io/thenickfish/docker-ai-sbx-claude:$TAG" && docker image save ghcr.io/thenickfish/docker-ai-sbx-claude:$TAG -o sbx-claude.tar && sbx template load sbx-claude.tar && sbx run claude --template ghcr.io/thenickfish/docker-ai-sbx-claude:$TAG --kit ./claude
scripts.run-pi: TAG=dev-$(date +%s) && docker buildx bake pi --load --no-cache --set "pi.tags=ghcr.io/thenickfish/docker-ai-sbx-pi:$TAG" && docker image save ghcr.io/thenickfish/docker-ai-sbx-pi:$TAG -o sbx-pi.tar && sbx template load sbx-pi.tar && sbx run shell --template ghcr.io/thenickfish/docker-ai-sbx-pi:$TAG --kit ./pi
